name: Spicy Shrimp and Avocado Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 small White onion, peeled and quartered (6 oz)
1 lb Cooked shrimp, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from bell peppers.
2. Split the peppers lengthwise and lightly oil the skin.
3. In an oven-proof pan, arrange the peppers (skin-side up), tomatoes, tomatillos, garlic, onion, and jalapenos.
4. Broil under high heat for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the skins of the peppers are charred and the tomatoes and tomatillos are blistered and soft. Allow vegetables to cool.
5. Peel the skin from the peppers.
6. In a food processor, combine the broiled vegetables (including any liquid from the pan) with cilantro, tomato juice, salt, maple syrup, and lime juice; blend until it yields a coarse puree.
7. Just before serving, add avocado and shrimp and mix well.
8. Serve with warm fried tortilla chips.
